# UX Checklist: Ingest municipal census datasets

**Purpose**: Validate maintainer UI for census ingestion runs, coverage, and failures.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/018-census-ingest/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Run Visibility

- [x] CHK-UX-001 Run list shows status, trigger type, census year, and timestamps.
- [x] CHK-UX-002 Coverage metrics and QA status are visible per run.
- [x] CHK-UX-003 Linking and suppression warnings are visible in the run detail view.

## Failure & Warnings

- [x] CHK-UX-004 UI shows actionable failure details for schema, linking, coverage, or promotion failures.
- [x] CHK-UX-005 UI clarifies that production indicators remain unchanged after failures.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [x] CHK-UX-006 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Census ingestion", "Coverage", "QA checks", "Promotion").
- [x] CHK-UX-007 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate.
